title: codonanthopsis aggregata
intro: Codonanthopsis aggregata, also known as the firewheel, is a flowering plant species in the family Gesneriaceae. It is native to tropical regions of Central and South America and is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial activities. The plant has been used to treat various health issues, including fever, colds, and respiratory infections, and is also said to have antioxidant and anti-cancer properties. Traditionally, the plant is prepared as a tea or decoction by infusing its leaves and flowers in hot water, and is also used in herbal preparations such as infusions, tinctures, and ointments.
